steps.title: Follow the conclusion
steps.content: The passage says core differentiation alone predicts too few siderophile elements in the upper mantle, yet siderophiles are much more abundant there than expected. The final sentence offers the conclusion that later extraterrestrial material likely added them.

steps.title: Use a result transition
steps.content: A signals concession, but the final sentence follows from the discrepancy rather than qualifying it. C would introduce an example, not a conclusion. D signals a parallel point, not an inference. The transition should mark the final sentence as a logical result of the evidence. The answer is B.
